hierarchy.pert_id: font-mono text-xs text-zinc-400 bg-white/[0.03] px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded border border-white/[0.08]

layout.app_shell: flex h-screen w-full overflow-hidden bg-[#050505] text-zinc-300 font-sans
layout.sidebar: w-60 flex-shrink-0 border-r border-white/[0.08] bg-[#0F0F0F] flex flex-col
layout.main_content: flex-1 flex flex-col h-full overflow-hidden relative
layout.header: h-14 border-b border-white/[0.08] flex items-center justify-between px-6 bg-[#050505] shrink-0
layout.toolbar: py-3 px-6 border-b border-white/[0.04] flex items-center gap-3 bg-[#050505]/80 backdrop-blur-md sticky top-0 z-10 shrink-0
layout.spacing_scale: Dense alignment. Standardize on gap-3 and px-4 for internal components. Maximize screen real estate.

components.task_row: group flex items-center justify-between py-2 px-3 -mx-3 rounded-md hover:bg-white/[0.04] transition-colors cursor-pointer border-b border-transparent hover:border-white/[0.02]
components.status_chip: inline-flex items-center px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-[11px] font-medium border tracking-wide
components.drawer_panel: Fixed right-0 top-0 bottom-0 w-[480px] border-l border-white/[0.08] bg-[#0F0F0F] shadow-2xl flex flex-col z-50 transform transition-transform duration-300
components.attachment_dropzone: mt-4 border border-dashed border-white/[0.15] rounded-md p-6 flex flex-col items-center justify-center hover:border-white/[0.3] hover:bg-white/[0.02] transition-all text-center cursor-pointer group
components.icon_button: h-7 w-7 rounded flex items-center justify-center text-zinc-400 hover:text-white hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors

filters.inactive: bg-transparent text-zinc-400 border border-white/10 hover:border-white/20 hover:text-zinc-200

motion.hover: Instant background fill on rows. No fade-in delay.

media.instructions: Use empty state image with extreme low opacity (e.g., opacity-5 or opacity-10) as an absolute positioned background mask for 'No Tasks Found' or the Dashboard overview to give a highly engineered, subtle texture.

testing.rules: All interactive elements MUST include a data-testid attribute (e.g., data-testid='filter-status-completed', data-testid='task-row-PERT-102').

specific_instructions_for_main_agent: 1. FRAMEWORK: Use Shadcn UI for structural interactive parts (Tabs for Timeline/List, Select for Team filter, Popover/Calendar for date ranges, Sheet for the side panel).

2. VISUAL LANGUAGE: Implement a strict 'Linear-inspired' aesthetic. This means deep black backgrounds (#050505), barely visible 1px borders (white/[0.08]), and absolutely zero heavy shadows or gradients. It must feel like an engineered terminal tool, not a consumer web app.
3. FONTS: Import IBM Plex Sans (Headings), Inter (Body), and JetBrains Mono (PERT IDs) from Google Fonts.
4. TASK LIST: Do not wrap tasks in heavy 'Cards'. Use flat rows (List View) that span the container width. They should feel incredibly dense and scannable.
5. ATTACHMENTS: The task side panel (Sheet) is critical. Build a local attachments UI block inside it: show an upload dropzone and a file list mimicking a desktop OS look.
6. MULTI-FILTER TOOLBAR: Place it directly below the header. Include: Team selector (QA default), Status toggles (Chips), Date range, and Search input.
7. STATS BAR: In the top right of the header, display lightweight counts (e.g., '3 Overdue', '12 Completed').
